data.title: PHINIA declares $0.27 dividend/share, payable Sept 12, 2025 to shareholders of record by Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: AUBURN HILLS, Mich.-- Premium fuel systems and aftermarket solutions leader, PHINIA Inc. (“PHINIA” or the “Company”) (NYSE: PHIN), has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per common share. The dividend will be payable on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 22, 2025. PHINIA is renowned for its premium solutions and components in the industry.

data.title: Kinetik's 2024 Sustainability Report showcases progress towards safer, lower-carbon energy future. #Sustainability #KNTK
data.description: Kinetik Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNTK) released its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing its sustainability efforts and accomplishments during the year. The report outlines the company's journey towards a safer, more eco-friendly, and dependable energy future, emphasizing its dedication to sustainability across all operations. This transparent review highlights Kinetik's advancements and commitment to reducing carbon emissions. The electronic version of the report is now available to the public.

data.title: Pacific Coast Oil Trust reports no cash distribution for July 2025 based on May 2025 profits.
data.description: Pacific Coast Oil Trust (OTC–ROYTL), a royalty trust established by Pacific Coast Energy Company LP, disclosed that no cash distribution will be made to unit holders of record on July 30, 2025. This decision was influenced by the Trust's evaluation of net profits earned in May 2025. The Conveyance terms dictate the allocation of net profits interests and overriding royalty interest, resulting in the lack of cash distribution for the Current Month.

data.title: Rogers Corp's Q2 2025 results show increased sales sequentially, with $28 million shares repurchased. CEO pleased with performance.
data.description: Rogers Corporation (NYSE:ROG) based in Chandler, Arizona, shared their financial results for Q2 of 2025. Ali El-Haj, the Interim President and CEO, noted that sales in the second quarter showed a sequential increase thanks to overall improvements in most end markets. The company's sales, gross margin, and adjusted earnings per share for the quarter all fell within the expected ranges. In addition, Rogers used its robust balance sheet to repurchase $28 million worth of shares during Q2.

Lumen Technologies CFO Commentary – Q2 2025 Highlights Q2 Revenue Miss: Slightly below estimates due to a $46M RDOF impact (federal broadband funding delay). Tax Bill Benefit: $400M in savings thanks to favorable tax legislation. Raised FY Cash Flow Guidance: Now

data.title: Aecon's Q2 2025 results show a record backlog of $10.7 billion, reported on July 31, 2025. ($10.7B backlog revealed)
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) released their second-quarter results for 2025. The company, headquartered in Toronto, disclosed their financial performance for the mentioned period.

data.title: Federated Hermes, Inc. achieves record assets under management of $845.7 billion, Q2 earnings report shows $1.16 per share.
data.description: Total assets being managed have hit an all-time high of $845.7 billion, with MDT strategies comprising $23.2 billion. This marks an increase of $6.4 billion from the first quarter of 2025 and a year-to-date rise of $8.9 billion. Earnings per diluted share stand at $1.16 for Q2 2025. The board has announced a dividend of $0.34 per share and has greenlit a new share repurchase initiative. The location of this development is Pittsburgh.

data.title: Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, THQ) paid distributions on July 31, 2025, to all shareholders.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, the Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, THQ) disclosed that they issued distributions to shareholders. The distributions were paid out on a per share basis, as detailed in the table accompanying the announcement.

data.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE: NRT) announces $0.26 per unit distribution for Q3 FY2025, payable on Aug 27, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Keene, New Hampshire, the Board of Trustees for North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE: NRT) disclosed a quarterly distribution of $0.26 per unit for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025. This distribution will be paid out on August 27, 2025, to shareholders on record as of August 15, 2025. This announcement signifies a positive outlook for investors in NRT as they anticipate receiving dividends during this quarter.

data.title: ELLKAY's President & CEO, Ajay Kapare, attends White House Health IT Summit to promote interoperability in healthcare.
data.description: Ajay Kapare, President and CEO of ELLKAY, a prominent healthcare data management partner based in Elmwood Park, New Jersey, was honored to be invited to the White House for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services' launch event on July 31, 2025. This event marks a significant milestone for ELLKAY, showcasing its influential role in the industry.

data.title: Mill City Ventures closes $450M private placement, starts SUI Treasury Strategy with Karatage Opportunities.
data.description: A company called Mill City Ventures III, Ltd. recently completed a private investment in public equity worth $450,000,000. They have now started utilizing their unique Sui blockchain treasury strategy. Karatage Opportunities, a hedge fund from London focusing on digital assets and emerging technologies, established by Marius Barnett and Stephen Mackintosh, assisted in this process.

data.title: AEye (Nasdaq: LIDR) reports Q2 2025 results, including a potential $30 million revenue opportunity with a leading transportation OEM.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, AEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: LIDR), known for its cutting-edge lidar technology including the Apollo lidar sensor, shared its performance for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company achieved significant milestones during this period, such as complete integration into the NVIDIA DRIVE AGX Orin platform. This development has not only broadened engagement prospects with major OEMs but has also set the stage for future Hyperion integration. Additionally, AEye was chosen by a prominent transportation OEM, presenting a substantial revenue potential of around $30 million. These accomplishments underscore the company's advancement and growing presence in the industry.

data.title: Procore (NYSE: PCOR) reports Q2 2025 financial results, CEO optimistic about growth, solid quarter.
data.description: Procore Technologies, Inc., a prominent global construction management software provider, released its financial results for the second quarter that concluded on June 30, 2025. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol PCOR, reported a robust performance during Q2. Founder, President, and CEO of Procore, Tooey Courtemanche, expressed satisfaction with the results, noting that the company is on track for efficient growth. The recent announcements made at the Innovation Summit have solidified Procore's position as a leader in the construction industry.

data.title: Roku releases Q2 2025 financial results. Live webcast conference call at 2:00 PM Pacific Time. Visit website for updates.
data.description: Today, Roku, Inc. announced its second quarter 2025 results. Interested parties can visit the Roku investor relations website to access the second quarter 2025 letter to shareholders. A live webcast of the conference call regarding the results will take place today at 2:00 PM Pacific Time. Participants can listen in on the Roku investor relations website in listen-only mode. An archived version of the webcast will be available post the conference call.

data.title: Weave reports strong Q2 2025 results: revenue growth, improved margins, increased free cash flow for small healthcare businesses.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Weave Communications, Inc. ("Weave") revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. As a prominent all-in-one customer experience and payments software platform catering to small and medium-sized healthcare enterprises, Weave, listed on the NYSE as WEAV, reported robust results. The second quarter of 2025 showcased notable revenue escalation, enhanced gross margins, and raised free cash flow figures. The company is experiencing evident progress across various growth channels, with Specialty Medical emerging as a key driver of this positive momentum.

data.title: Leading credit companies like Visa and Mastercard are increasing stablecoin offerings to adapt to rising competition from tech firms in blockchain-based payments.
data.description: Major payment companies such as Visa and Mastercard, along with technology firms and banking institutions, are currently investigating the potential of utilizing blockchain technology for payment processing and settlement purposes. This move signifies a growing interest in adopting this innovative technology within the financial sector.

data.title: Tranquility AI executives to attend FBI National Academy Associates conference on August 2-5, 2025 at Baltimore Convention Center.
data.description: Tranquility AI, Inc., a prominent AI solutions provider for law enforcement and government agencies, revealed that their Vice President of Analytics & Investigations, Kevin Clark, and Director of Law Enforcement – Strategic Solutions, Brad Bowers, will be attending the FBI National Academy Associates Annual Training Conference. The event is scheduled to take place from August 2 to 5, 2025, at the Baltimore Convention Center. Kevin Clark and Brad Bowers will be representing the company at this important conference.
